mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deploy_record
AND project_id = #{projectId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO deploy_record (project_id, version_id, node_id, status, jar_name, log, start_time, end_time, create_time, schedule_time) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{versionId}, #{nodeId}, #{status}, #{jarName}, #{log}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{createTime}, #{scheduleTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE deploy_record SET status = #{status}, log = #{log}, end_time = #{endTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM deploy_record WHERE status = 5 AND schedule_time > 0 AND schedule_time <= #{cutoff} ORDER BY schedule_time ASC LIMIT 20
